name: DeepSeek V4 Pro (1.6T)
description: 1.6T total (49B activated). V4 hybrid CSA+HCA attention: num_key_value_heads=1 with a single shared K==V cache tensor of head_dim=512 (mlaDc=head_dim, mlaDr=0; rope_head_dim=64 is a slice within the 512-dim cache, not a separate buffer like V3 MLA). All 61 layers are MoE (no first_k_dense_replace). Source: HF deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Pro config.json + inference/model.py.
